Our Story

About Woofy Crafts

Woofy Crafts started with a simple idea: the best gifts are the ones that don't fade. Born in Kalutara from a love of making things by hand, every piece we create carries a little bit of heart in it.

We work with ribbons, pipe cleaners, and pearls. Nothing exotic, just materials handled with patience and care. The result is something that sits on your shelf long after the occasion has passed and still makes you smile.

Whether it's a birthday, a graduation, a wedding, or just a quiet moment that deserves marking. We're here to help you give something that actually lasts.

"Handcrafted Blooms, Heartfelt Moments"
🌸
🌺
Meet the Founder

Hasithmi

Imbulagoda

Founder & CEO · Woofy Crafts · Entrepreneur

Hasithmi started Woofy Crafts the way most good things start quietly, at a table at home, figuring it out. What began as a personal creative outlet grew into something real: a small business built entirely on handmade work and word of mouth.

She still makes every bouquet herself. That part has never changed and she has no plans to change it.

Terms & Conditions
Last updated: January 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing, browsing, or placing an order through Woofy Crafts, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

2. Products & Orders

All bouquets are handcrafted by Hasithmi Imbulagoda. Each piece is unique — slight variations in color, size, and arrangement are natural and expected in handmade items. Product photos are representative; your order may differ slightly due to material availability.

  • Orders are confirmed only after payment or deposit is received.
  • Custom orders require at least 3–5 business days lead time.
  • Bulk or event orders may require additional lead time — please contact us in advance.
  • We reserve the right to decline orders at our discretion.

3. Pricing & Payment

All prices are listed in Sri Lankan Rupees (LKR) and are subject to change without notice. Payment methods accepted include bank transfer and cash on delivery (COD) where available. Prices do not include delivery charges unless stated.

4. Delivery

We currently deliver island-wide via PickMe Flash. Delivery charges are calculated based on your location and are the responsibility of the buyer. Woofy Crafts is not liable for delays caused by the delivery service provider. Delivery times are estimates and not guaranteed.

  • Orders are dispatched within 1–2 business days of confirmation.
  • Fragile items are packaged with care, but we are not responsible for damage caused during transit.
  • Please ensure someone is available to receive the order at the provided address.

5. Returns & Refunds

Due to the handmade and perishable nature of our products, we do not accept returns or exchanges unless the item arrives damaged or is significantly different from what was ordered.

  • Claims must be submitted within 24 hours of receiving the order, with photo evidence.
  • Approved refunds will be processed within 5–7 business days.
  • Custom orders are non-refundable once production has commenced.
  • Promotional or discounted items are final sale.

6. Custom Orders

Custom orders are made-to-order based on your specifications. A 50% deposit may be required before production begins. The remaining balance is due before dispatch. Once a custom order is confirmed and production has begun, cancellations are not accepted.

7. Intellectual Property

All content on this website — including photographs, designs, text, and the Woofy Crafts logo — is the intellectual property of Woofy Crafts and Hasithmi Imbulagoda. Reproduction, distribution, or use of any content without prior written permission is strictly prohibited.

8. Use of Promo Codes

Promotional codes (e.g., WOOFY10) are valid for one use per customer unless stated otherwise, cannot be combined with other offers, and may expire without notice. Woofy Crafts reserves the right to revoke any promotional offer at any time.

9. Limitation of Liability

Woofy Crafts shall not be held liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or services. Our total liability shall not exceed the value of the order placed.

10. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of Sri Lanka. Any disputes shall be resolved under the jurisdiction of Sri Lankan courts.

11. Contact

For any questions regarding these Terms, please contact us at [email protected] or via WhatsApp at +94 78 613 3943.

© 2026 Woofy Crafts. All rights reserved.
Privacy Policy
Last updated: January 2026

1. Who We Are

Woofy Crafts is a handmade bouquet business operated by Hasithmi Imbulagoda, based in Kalutara, Sri Lanka. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you interact with us through this website, WhatsApp, Instagram, or TikTok.

2. Information We Collect

We may collect the following information when you place an order, contact us, or use our services:

  • Name — to personalise your order and communications.
  • Phone number / WhatsApp — to coordinate delivery and confirm orders.
  • Delivery address — to dispatch your order via PickMe Flash.
  • Email address — for order confirmations and updates (if provided).
  • Order details — items, customisation preferences, and special requests.

We do not collect payment card details. Payments are made via bank transfer or agreed methods directly.

3. How We Use Your Information

  • To process and fulfil your order.
  • To contact you regarding your order status or any issues.
  • To improve our products and services based on feedback.
  • We will never sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

4. Data Storage & Security

Your information is stored securely and accessed only by Hasithmi Imbulagoda for the purposes described above. We retain order information for up to 12 months for record-keeping, after which it is deleted.

5. Cookies

This website uses essential cookies to remember your preferences (such as cart items and wishlist). We do not use third-party tracking cookies or advertising cookies. By continuing to use the site, you consent to the use of essential cookies.

6. Social Media

When you interact with our Instagram (@woofycrafts_hasii) or TikTok (@woofy.crafts) pages, those platforms' own privacy policies apply.

7. Your Rights

You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of any personal information we hold about you. To exercise these rights, please contact us at [email protected].

8. Children's Privacy

Our services are not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal infor
